Query: MATCH (n) SET n.risk_score = coalesce(n.finding_risk_score, 0)
MATCH (n) WHERE n.exposed_internet = true SET n.risk_score = coalesce(n.risk_score, 0) + 30 RETURN labels(n) AS labels, n.name AS name, n.instanceid AS instanceid, n.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (ec2:EC2Instance) WHERE ec2.publicipaddress IS NOT NULL SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 20 RETURN ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, ec2.publicipaddress AS publicipaddress, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (lb:LoadBalancerV2) WHERE lb.exposed_internet = true SET lb.risk_score = coalesce(lb.risk_score, 0) + 25 RETURN lb.name AS name, lb.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (b:S3Bucket) WHERE b.anonymous_access = true SET b.risk_score = coalesce(b.risk_score, 0) + 40 RETURN b.name AS name, b.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (b:S3Bucket) WHERE b.anonymous_actions IS NOT NULL AND "s3:GetObject" IN b.anonymous_actions SET b.risk_score = coalesce(b.risk_score, 0) + 30 RETURN b.name AS name, b.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (b:S3Bucket) WHERE b.anonymous_actions IS NOT NULL AND "s3:PutObject" IN b.anonymous_actions SET b.risk_score = coalesce(b.risk_score, 0) + 50 RETURN b.name AS name, b.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (sg:EC2SecurityGroup)-[:HAS_INGRESS_RULE]->(rule:EC2SecurityGroupRule) WHERE rule.cidr_ip = "0.0.0.0/0" SET sg.risk_score = coalesce(sg.risk_score, 0) + 20 RETURN sg.groupid AS groupid, rule.from_port AS from_port, sg.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (ec2:EC2Instance)-[:MEMBER_OF_EC2_SECURITY_GROUP]->(sg)-[:HAS_INGRESS_RULE]->(rule) WHERE rule.cidr_ip = "0.0.0.0/0" AND rule.from_port = 22 SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 25 RETURN ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (ec2:EC2Instance)-[:MEMBER_OF_EC2_SECURITY_GROUP]->(sg)-[:HAS_INGRESS_RULE]->(rule) WHERE rule.cidr_ip = "0.0.0.0/0" AND rule.from_port = 3389 SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 25 RETURN ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (lb:LoadBalancerV2)-[:EXPOSE]->(ec2:EC2Instance) WHERE lb.exposed_internet = true SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 20 RETURN lb.name AS lb_name, ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (ec2:EC2Instance)-[:ASSUMES_ROLE]->(role:AWSRole) SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 10 RETURN ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, role.name AS role_name, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (role:AWSRole)-[:ATTACHED_POLICY]->(policy:AWSPolicy) WHERE policy.name CONTAINS "Admin" SET role.risk_score = coalesce(role.risk_score, 0) + 50 RETURN role.name AS name, role.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (ec2:EC2Instance)-[:ASSUMES_ROLE]->(role:AWSRole) WHERE ec2.exposed_internet = true SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 40 RETURN ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, role.name AS role_name, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (ec2:EC2Instance)-[:ASSUMES_ROLE]->(:AWSRole)-[:ALLOWS]->(b:S3Bucket) WHERE ec2.exposed_internet = true SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 40 RETURN ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, b.name AS bucket_name, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (lb:LoadBalancerV2) WHERE lb.name STARTS WITH 'k8s-' AND lb.exposed_internet = true SET lb.risk_score = coalesce(lb.risk_score, 0) + 30 RETURN lb.name AS name, lb.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (ec2:EC2Instance) WHERE ec2.publicipaddress IS NOT NULL AND ec2.tags IS NOT NULL AND toString(ec2.tags) CONTAINS 'kubernetes' SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 20 RETURN ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (r:RDSInstance) WHERE r.publicly_accessible = true SET r.risk_score = coalesce(r.risk_score, 0) + 30 RETURN r.db_instance_identifier AS db_instance_identifier, r.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (r:RDSInstance) WHERE r.storage_encrypted = false SET r.risk_score = coalesce(r.risk_score, 0) + 25 RETURN r.db_instance_identifier AS db_instance_identifier, r.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (r:RDSInstance) WHERE r.deletion_protection = false SET r.risk_score = coalesce(r.risk_score, 0) + 10 RETURN r.db_instance_identifier AS db_instance_identifier, r.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (c:RDSCluster) WHERE c.storage_encrypted = false SET c.risk_score = coalesce(c.risk_score, 0) + 25 RETURN c.db_cluster_identifier AS db_cluster_identifier, c.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (b:S3Bucket) WHERE b.default_encryption = false OR b.default_encryption IS NULL SET b.risk_score = coalesce(b.risk_score, 0) + 20 RETURN b.name AS name, b.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (b:S3Bucket) WHERE b.versioning_status IS NULL OR b.versioning_status <> 'Enabled' SET b.risk_score = coalesce(b.risk_score, 0) + 10 RETURN b.name AS name, b.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (b:S3Bucket) WHERE b.logging_enabled = false OR b.logging_enabled IS NULL SET b.risk_score = coalesce(b.risk_score, 0) + 10 RETURN b.name AS name, b.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (l:AWSLambda) WHERE l.anonymous_access = true SET l.risk_score = coalesce(l.risk_score, 0) + 35 RETURN l.arn AS arn, l.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (ec2:EC2Instance) WHERE ec2.metadatahttptokens = 'optional' OR ec2.imdsv1enabled = true SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 20 RETURN ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (ec2:EC2Instance) WHERE ec2.monitoringstate <> 'enabled' SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 5 RETURN ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (v:EBSVolume) WHERE v.encrypted = false SET v.risk_score = coalesce(v.risk_score, 0) + 15 RETURN v.volumeid AS volumeid, v.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (u:AWSUser) WHERE NOT (u)-[:MFA_DEVICE]->(:AWSMfaDevice) SET u.risk_score = coalesce(u.risk_score, 0) + 25 RETURN u.arn AS arn, u.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (lb:LoadBalancerV2) WHERE lb.scheme = 'internet-facing' SET lb.risk_score = coalesce(lb.risk_score, 0) + 20 RETURN lb.dnsname AS dnsname, lb.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (range:AWSIpRange {range: '0.0.0.0/0'})-[:MEMBER_OF_IP_RULE]->(rule:AWSIpRule)-[:MEMBER_OF_EC2_SECURITY_GROUP]->(sg:EC2SecurityGroup) SET sg.risk_score = coalesce(sg.risk_score, 0) + 20 RETURN sg.groupid AS groupid, rule.fromport AS fromport, rule.toport AS toport, sg.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (range:AWSIpRange {range: '0.0.0.0/0'})-[:MEMBER_OF_IP_RULE]->(rule:AWSIpRule)-[:MEMBER_OF_EC2_SECURITY_GROUP]->(sg:EC2SecurityGroup)<-[:MEMBER_OF_EC2_SECURITY_GROUP]-(ec2:EC2Instance) WHERE rule.fromport <= 22 AND rule.toport >= 22 SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 25 RETURN ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score

MATCH (range:AWSIpRange {range: '0.0.0.0/0'})-[:MEMBER_OF_IP_RULE]->(rule:AWSIpRule)-[:MEMBER_OF_EC2_SECURITY_GROUP]->(sg:EC2SecurityGroup)<-[:MEMBER_OF_EC2_SECURITY_GROUP]-(ec2:EC2Instance) WHERE rule.fromport <= 3389 AND rule.toport >= 3389 SET ec2.risk_score = coalesce(ec2.risk_score, 0) + 25 RETURN ec2.instanceid AS instanceid, ec2.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (s:AzureStorageAccount) WHERE s.supportshttpstrafficonly = false SET s.risk_score = coalesce(s.risk_score, 0) + 20 RETURN s.id AS id, s.risk_score AS risk_score

Description: Azure Function App HTTPS Not Enforced
Query: MATCH (f:AzureFunctionApp) WHERE f.https_only = false SET f.risk_score = coalesce(f.risk_score, 0) + 20 RETURN f.id AS id, f.risk_score AS risk_score

Description: Azure App Service HTTPS Not Enforced
Query: MATCH (a:AzureAppService) WHERE a.https_only = false SET a.risk_score = coalesce(a.risk_score, 0) + 20 RETURN a.id AS id, a.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (c:AzureCosmosDBAccount) WHERE c.publicnetworkaccess = 'Enabled' SET c.risk_score = coalesce(c.risk_score, 0) + 25 RETURN c.id AS id, c.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (c:AzureCosmosDBAccount) WHERE c.virtualnetworkfilterenabled = false SET c.risk_score = coalesce(c.risk_score, 0) + 15 RETURN c.id AS id, c.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (vm:AzureVirtualMachine) WHERE vm.identity_type IS NULL SET vm.risk_score = coalesce(vm.risk_score, 0) + 10 RETURN vm.id AS id, vm.risk_score AS risk_score
MATCH (n) WHERE n.risk_score IS NOT NULL SET n.normalized_risk = CASE WHEN n.risk_score > 100 THEN 100 ELSE n.risk_score END

MATCH (n) WHERE n.normalized_risk IS NOT NULL SET n.risk_level = CASE WHEN n.normalized_risk >= 80 THEN "CRITICAL" WHEN n.normalized_risk >= 60 THEN "HIGH" WHEN n.normalized_risk >= 30 THEN "MEDIUM" ELSE "LOW" END

MATCH (n) WHERE n.normalized_risk IS NOT NULL RETURN labels(n) AS labels, n.name AS name, n.instanceid AS instanceid, n.normalized_risk AS normalized_risk, n.risk_level AS risk_level, n.region AS region ORDER BY n.normalized_risk DESC LIMIT 20
